introSection:
Jet Star is a steel roller coaster located at Luna Park La Palmyre in France.

In 1976, Jet Star operated at Coney Island. The roller coaster operated at Knoebels Amusement Resort from 1977 to 1992. It was replaced by Whirlwind in 1993.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Pink track and white supports, used to be yellow track and grey supports. It had Orange track and aqua supports when it was overseas

fullText:
Jet Star is a steel roller coaster located at Luna Park La Palmyre in France.

In 1976, Jet Star operated at Coney Island. The roller coaster operated at Knoebels Amusement Resort from 1977 to 1992. It was replaced by Whirlwind in 1993.



Pink track and white supports, used to be yellow track and grey supports. It had Orange track and aqua supports when it was overseas
